paper.title: Andersen-Tawil disease evidence fixture paper
paper.conversation_summary: Extract evidence-backed disease findings from a known paper fixture.

chunks.text: Figure 4A. loss of kcnj2 produced a ventricular arrhythmia phenotype, establishing this zebrafish line as a model of Andersen-Tawil syndrome.
Patients with KCNJ2 variants in our cohort showed features consistent with Andersen-Tawil syndrome.
Andersen-Tawil syndrome has been linked to KCNJ2 in previous studies.
